name: Easy Breakfast Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package chive, veggie or regular cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 425 degrees.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan.
3. Unroll dough and place it in the greased pan. Starting at the center, press the dough with your hands.
4. Bake for 6 to 7 minutes or until the crust begins to brown.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine eggs, half-and-half, salt, and pepper. Beat well.
6. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add the egg mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until thoroughly cooked but still moist. Remove from heat.
7. Spoon the cooked egg mixture evenly over the partially baked crust.
8. Drop cream cheese by teaspoonfuls over the eggs.
9. Arrange bacon in a spoke fashion on top of the pizza.
10. Bake for an additional 8 to 12 minutes or until toppings are thoroughly heated and the crust is deep golden brown.
11. Garnish with green onions, if desired.
